Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets recall the typical P2P process steps in order 1 Create Purchase Requisition PR 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Issue Purchase Order PO 4 Receive Goods 5 Receive Vendor Invoice 6 Match Invoice to Purchase Order and possibly goods receipt 7 Release Payment 8 Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1001 Activities in order Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case This seems to follow the standard sequence No obvious anomaly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Activities in order Create Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Vendor Invoice Received Release Payment Approve Purchase Requisition Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies in Case 1002 1 The Purchase Order is issued before the Purchase Requisition is approved In standard P2P the PR should be approved before converting to PO

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The Vendor Invoice is received before the goods are received Typically invoice comes after goods receipt but sometimes it can be before or around the same time So invoice before goods receipt is possible but might indicate an issue

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: More critically The payment is released on 2024 02 03 07 15 but the goods are received on 2024 02 04 09 00 That means payment is made before receiving goods Also the invoice is not matched to PO before payment The match happens on 2024 02 05 after payment So payment is released without matching

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also the approval of PR happens on 2024 02 03 08 00 after the PO was issued and even after the invoice and payment So the PR is approved very late

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Activities in order Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Release Payment Then Vendor Invoice Received Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Payment released before goods receipt before invoice receipt and before matching This is very unusual and risky

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Activities in order Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Receive Goods Issue Purchase Order Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Here goods are received before the Purchase Order is issued The PO is issued after goods receipt That is an anomaly because usually PO is issued first then goods are received against that PO

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: However sometimes goods might be received before PO if it is an emergency But still the sequence is unusual

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Issuing a PO before PR approval can lead to unauthorized purchases Releasing payment before goods receipt risks paying for goods that may not be received or may be rejected Releasing payment before matching can lead to paying incorrect amounts or for goods not ordered Goods receipt before PO can lead to receiving goods without a purchase commitment which might cause compliance issues
